programme.title: Jhoom Barabar Jhoom
programme.desc: A man and a woman, engaged to marry different people, spend a couple of hours chatting together at a train station only to fall for each other. Release Year: 2007 Director: Shaad Ali

programme.title: Dangal
programme.desc: A determined wrestler battles social pressure and rivals, rising from rural roots to national fame, proving courage and grit can change destiny. Release Year: 2016 Director: Nitesh Tiwari Awards: 40 wins and 36 nominations

programme.title: Haathi Mere Saathi
programme.desc: Raju performs at the streets in the company of four elephants. He gets married and is told to make a choice between his animal friends or his family. Release Year: 1971 Director: M. A. Thirumugam

programme.title: Lamhe
programme.desc: Viren falls for Pallavi, but she marries Siddharth. The couple dies, leaving behind their daughter, who grows up to look just like her mother and falls in love with Viren. Release Year: 1991 Director: Yash Chopra Awards: Filmfare Awards- Best Film - Yash Chopra, Best Story - Honey Irani, Best Dialogue - Rahi Masoom Raza, Best Costume Design - Neeta Lulla

programme.title: Understand The World, One Story At A Time
programme.desc: Our deep dive format explains the stories that matter - with clarity, context and journalistic rigor. Each segment goes beyond the headlines to uncover what's driving key developments around the world, featuring sharp analysis, expert voices and exclusive on the ground insights from where events are unfolding.

programme.title: Does The Internet Have An Expiration Date?
programme.desc: Could quantum computers break the internet as we know it? Meta's AI is checking your age, Nvidia wants your PC to think for you, and AI is even entering religion. But at what cost?

programme.title: 250 Years Of The US; Dangerous Trends
programme.desc: 250 years of the US Declaration of Independence; a look at its history. And: Looksmaxxing - a dangerous social media trend that's promising young men success through extreme appearance optimization.

programme.title: Bodybuilding
programme.desc: Gen Z is more fitness-crazy than ever before. We meet Mirtel, 17 years old, in Tallinn, Estonia - she has ONE goal: to win gold at the European Bodybuilding Championships. We accompany them through the toughest phase of preparation and go to the championship in Spain. What does it cost to give EVERYTHING for this - and will it be enough in the end?

programme.title: Operation Barbarossa - War Of Annihilation - Part 1: Summer
programme.desc: On 22 June 1941, the German Wehrmacht launched a war of aggression against the Soviet Union. Under the code name ‘Operation Barbarossa', the campaign aimed to bring the vast country in the east to its knees. Millions of people died as a result.

E305 - The Crew Builds A Giant Skate Track / The Crew Builds A Giant Ice Cream Mak
programme.desc: Rubble & Crew help River take lots of pictures for the big photo contest by building a super-fast way to get around Bulider Cove. // Rubble and the pups help Cafe Carl make enough ice cream for everyone! If Speed Meister doesn't get in the way...

programme.title: E831 - Mr Potato's Fruit & Vegetable Quiz
programme.desc: Peppa and friends are at school where they have a special guest, Mr Potato! Mr Potato is there to host a special quiz for the children about fruit and vegetables.

programme.title: E107 - Nanny Plum's Lesson / Mrs Witch
programme.desc: Nanny Plum gets blown away. Ben, Holly and Gaston the Ladybird come to her rescue. // Queen Thistle reads Ben and Holly a book about a nasty witch, so Nanny takes them to meet a real one. But Nanny is rude, and the witch freezes her with magic.

programme.title: E906 - Ice Cream Team
programme.desc: Ice Cream Truck Blaze must help out in three ice cream emergencies by transforming into three epic ice cream vehicles: an Ice Cream Helicopter, an Ice Cream Submarine, and an Ice Cream Spaceship!

programme.title: E218 - The Crew Raises A Runway / The Crew Builds A Giant Skateboard
programme.desc: When Buttons the deer needs to cross the Builder Cove airport's runway, Rubble & Crew know just what to build // Rubble & Crew build a supersized skateboard for Auntie Crane and River's show. But when it rolls out of control, the pups lead the chase!

programme.title: E107 - Treasure / Roar / Mammoth
programme.desc: Tim, Tommy, Tia and Grandma go on the search for treasure. // It's the Roar Festival, and Tim wants to have the best Roar in town. // Tim, Tommy and Tia find a lost mammoth in their house.

programme.title: E148 - Grandpa Pig's Boat
programme.desc: Peppa and George go for a ride in Grandpa Pig's boat. Danny Dog and Granddad Dog are also out sailing. Grandpa Pig and Granddad Dog race their boats to see which is fastest.

programme.desc: Nanny Plum gets blown away. Ben, Holly and Gaston the Ladybird come to her rescue. // Queen Thistle reads Ben and Holly a book about a nasty witch, so Nanny takes them to meet a real one. But Nanny is rude, and the witch freezes her with magic.

programme.title: E524 - Pups Save A Pluck-O-Matic / Pups Save A Mascot

programme.title: Un Si Grand Soleil S8

programme.title: E37 - Pesky Pests
programme.desc: Edmond the squirrel and Lucy the bear cub grew up together. They live in a majestic chestnut tree in the heart of the forest. With their friends they solve riddles and live thrilling adventures, with every day bringing new wonders to discover in the natural world around them.

programme.title: E8
programme.desc: 以日本尚未制度化的臥底誘捕調查為主題，森川葵在劇中飾演的是警視廳新設立小隊「STINGERS（臥底搜查檢證室）」的隊長——二階堂民子。她是警察廳的菁英份子，曾赴美接受 FBI 的正統「Sting Operation（臥底行動）」訓練，身為頂尖精英警視歸國。擅長偽裝、即興演技、心理操控與陷阱設計，是臥底搜查的專家。說話簡潔、指示神秘，經常以出人意表的行動讓部下摸不著頭緒，卻又總能在不知不覺間讓一切線索串連起來。這位充滿謎團的領導者，將帶領 STINGERS 成功解決各種案件。

programme.title: E8
programme.desc: 以日本尚未制度化的臥底誘捕調查為主題，森川葵在劇中飾演的是警視廳新設立小隊「STINGERS（臥底搜查檢證室）」的隊長——二階堂民子。她是警察廳的菁英份子，曾赴美接受 FBI 的正統「Sting Operation（臥底行動）」訓練，身為頂尖精英警視歸國。擅長偽裝、即興演技、心理操控與陷阱設計，是臥底搜查的專家。說話簡潔、指示神秘，經常以出人意表的行動讓部下摸不著頭緒，卻又總能在不知不覺間讓一切線索串連起來。這位充滿謎團的領導者，將帶領 STINGERS 成功解決各種案件。

programme.title: E10
programme.desc: 故事取材自 1984 年的真實經歷，當時三谷寫了一部喜劇小品劇本，準備在澀谷一家脫衣舞劇院的脫衣舞表演間隙表演，以分散來檢查的警察的注意力。

programme.title: E8
programme.desc: 故事以夏日的相遇為主題，在海邊一起出生及長大的「海邊的灰姑娘」女子三人組與在東京就讀一流大學的優等生男子們相識的故事。在盛夏的海邊出現命運般的相遇，各人一起努力跨越看不見的差異，帶著複雜交錯的感情，相互交織想法一起成長。

programme.title: E3
programme.desc: 大學時期的男主角月岡夏，與同學南雲水季交往起來，並過著幸福的日子。然而，正當他們都在忙著就業活動的時候，水季卻突然向他提出分手，從此兩人分道揚鑣。就這樣過了七年，已經開展新生活的夏，卻突然收到大學時代朋友的通知，原來水季已經離開了人世。從分手那天起就沒有再見過水季的夏，帶著難以置信的心情去參加了水季的葬禮。在葬禮上，夏見到了一個名叫海的小女孩，並得知她是水季和他的女兒，讓他感到十分震驚。原來當年水季竟瞞著他生下了他們的孩子，並且一直默默地撫養著這個孩子。知道這一切以後，夏開始思考水季和海在這七年間的生活。

programme.title: E10
programme.desc: 故事取材自 1984 年的真實經歷，當時三谷寫了一部喜劇小品劇本，準備在澀谷一家脫衣舞劇院的脫衣舞表演間隙表演，以分散來檢查的警察的注意力。

programme.desc: 大學時期的男主角月岡夏，與同學南雲水季交往起來，並過著幸福的日子。然而，正當他們都在忙著就業活動的時候，水季卻突然向他提出分手，從此兩人分道揚鑣。就這樣過了七年，已經開展新生活的夏，卻突然收到大學時代朋友的通知，原來水季已經離開了人世。從分手那天起就沒有再見過水季的夏，帶著難以置信的心情去參加了水季的葬禮。在葬禮上，夏見到了一個名叫海的小女孩，並得知她是水季和他的女兒，讓他感到十分震驚。原來當年水季竟瞞著他生下了他們的孩子，並且一直默默地撫養著這個孩子。知道這一切以後，夏開始思考水季和海在這七年間的生活。

programme.title: E10
programme.desc: 故事取材自 1984 年的真實經歷，當時三谷寫了一部喜劇小品劇本，準備在澀谷一家脫衣舞劇院的脫衣舞表演間隙表演，以分散來檢查的警察的注意力。

programme.title: E8
programme.desc: 故事以夏日的相遇為主題，在海邊一起出生及長大的「海邊的灰姑娘」女子三人組與在東京就讀一流大學的優等生男子們相識的故事。在盛夏的海邊出現命運般的相遇，各人一起努力跨越看不見的差異，帶著複雜交錯的感情，相互交織想法一起成長。

programme.desc: The Marsupilamis are great at making music, and when a music producer hears it Jade says it was her. // Lalou's cat adoption day doesn't go smoothly, when Punch is adopted by mistake.

programme.title: E331 - The Green Tentacle / Happy Krabby Birthday
programme.desc: Sandy seeks Squidward's help to heal her sick tree, but his alternative gardening methods give her a headache. // SpongeBob and Squidward search for the perfect birthday present for Mr. Krabs.

programme.title: E104 - Lay Lay & Sadie's Big Hair Adventure
programme.desc: During a prank war, Lay Lay goes too far and unintentionally breaks an unsaid rule: you don't mess with a Black woman's hair. Lay Lay learns the value and beauty of Black hair as she and Sadie try to fix it before they go to a concert.

programme.title: E218 - Ox Pox
programme.desc: When Piper gets a mysterious illness, Captain Man must travel back in time to the 1700s to find the only cure.

programme.title: E104 - Donnie Hangs Tough
programme.desc: It's a battle of the wits between Donnie and Bishop as he races through NYC's subway system to stop her evil Mechazoids. But how do you beat an AI that counters your every move?

programme.title: E216 - Let's Go to the Movies!
programme.desc: ShoutOut has a once-in-a-lifetime opportunity to sell a movie to Hollywood bigshot Deuce Van Nuys, but when her mind goes blank under the pressure, the rest of Danger Force pitch in and share their own epic--and epically bad--movie ideas.

programme.title: E1008 - My Phony Valentine / Man Of My Schemes
programme.desc: On Valentines Day, Rusty and his girlfriend, Amber, must hide their love when they realize their parents are business rivals. // When Lori sees a photo of Bobby with another woman on social media, she decides it's time to start dating again.

programme.title: E1012 - Student of the Jeer / Bean Dreams
programme.desc: Hoping to change her reputation at school, Stella tries to prove that she's not the teachers' pet. // Lori explores a potential career path after her boss suggests she has a strong future within the Burnt Bean organization.

programme.title: E286 - Sir Urchin and Snail Fail
programme.desc: SpongeBob SquarePants is a cartoon series starring the yellow sea sponge Spongebob who lives deep in the ocean in the underwater town called Bikini Bottom. Together with his buddy the pink starfish Patrick, he experiences the craziest adventures.

programme.title: E5 - Naples And The Amalfi Coast
programme.desc: Stanley Tucci feasts on pizza in Naples, searches for the best San Marzano tomatoes and continues his culinary journey on the island of Ischia and the Amalfi Coast.

programme.title: E3
programme.desc: As he starts the final part of his journey deep into Iraq, Michael finds a local school in Baghdad and as he did in North Korea talks to the children about life in Iraq and what they hope to do in the future, and how they see the rest of the world. Michael then visits the ancient site of Babylon, a place he used to read about when he was studying the bible at school. He also gets access to enter the massive palace built by Saddam Hussein that overlooks the historic site.

programme.title: E2 - Royals And Rebels
programme.desc: Alex and Nat meet a new guide, Sithu. Heading north, the team are trying to follow Tim's old road to India's notorious 'Wild West', but Sithu warns of an escalating civil war on the road ahead.

programme.title: E151
programme.desc: Through the captivating stories presented in We Are One, the viewers can fully immerse themselves in the narratives and witness the genuine emotions that arise between humans and animals. These emotions are rooted in love and go beyond mere boundaries, showcasing the remarkable power of love in forging meaningful connections.
NEWS ON THE HOUR: Provides live coverage of news and current affairs from around the world, bringing viewers the latest breaking news.

programme.title: E391
programme.desc: PHOENIX SUPER DOCTORS: Phoenix Super Doctors is a cross-media health science popularization program. It precisely targets core audiences aged 25-65, including business leaders, middle-class, white-collar workers and highly educated individuals. Centered on trending health topics, the program integrates the wisdom of traditional Chinese medicine with cutting-edge achievements in modern Western medicine. Featuring a top-tier expert team led by academicians, it delivers an immersive, virtual-real blended audiovisual experience through XR virtual scenarios and AI-powered intelligent graphics.

programme.title: E176
programme.desc: GBA Discovery visits the 9+2 cities in the GBA. It provides in-depth coverage of the landmarks, personalities and hotspots in the Greater Bay Area, and leads viewers to experience the prosperity and innovation of the GBA in a holistic manner, as well as the lesser-known stories.

programme.title: News Times
programme.desc: News Time is meant to put events into historical perspective. The background and history comparison are supplemented with keen observation, critical thinking and interviews, delivering unique insights into trends, thereby casting light on China's future.

programme.title: Hong Kong Perspectives
programme.desc: Hong Kong Perspectives offers interviews with major SAR government officials, LegCo president, as well as experts from think tanks, the programme explains the essence of the Basic Law and explores how it has been implemented citing examples from the past.

Find out what's going on in the world of economy, politics, culture, sport, medicine, ecology. Focus has it all covered for you. Short videos contain facts, interviews with real people, numbers, statistics, everything you need to be aware of recent events in the world and of what is actually going on.

programme.title: E24
programme.desc: After a year of imprisonment under Murashige, Kanbei has reached his physical and mental limits. The standoff between Murashige, who continues to hold out, and the Oda forces has dragged on, but Koichiro succeeds in cutting off the supply lines. Persuaded by his wife Dashi (Yamaya Kasumi), Murashige finally decides to surrender. Tasked with informing Nobunaga, Koichiro asks Dashi to deliver a message to Kanbei. Just when it seems the conflict will end without further bloodshed, events take a devastating turn, and everything changes.

programme.desc: After a year of imprisonment under Murashige, Kanbei has reached his physical and mental limits. Persuaded by his wife Dashi (Yamaya Kasumi), Murashige finally decides to surrender. Tasked with informing Nobunaga, Koichiro asks Dashi to deliver a message to Kanbei. Just when it seems the conflict will end without further bloodshed, events take a devastating turn, and everything changes.

programme.title: CNBC Explains
programme.desc: ‘CNBC Explains' is a dynamic explainer series that dives deep into the forces shaping our world. Each episode unpacks complex business and economic topics, breaking them down into clear, compelling narratives. With expert insights, data-driven visuals and a global perspective, this series helps viewers understand not just what is happening, but why it matters.

programme.title: CNBC Meets
programme.desc: Hosted by Tania Bryer, “CNBC Meets” is an intimate interview series that takes viewers inside the lives and legacies of trailblazers across business, entertainment, sport and politics. Each episode offers rare access to their homes, offices and empires - uncovering the ambitions, challenges and entrepreneurial mindsets that shaped their success and continue to drive them forward.

programme.title: The Tonight Show Starring Jimmy Fallon
programme.desc: Emmy Award- and Grammy Award-winning comedian Jimmy Fallon brings a high-tempo energy to the storied NBC franchise with his welcoming interview style, love of audience participation, spot-on impersonations and innovative sketches.

programme.title: The Tonight Show Starring Jimmy Fallon
programme.desc: Emmy Award- and Grammy Award-winning comedian Jimmy Fallon brings a high-tempo energy to the storied NBC franchise with his welcoming interview style, love of audience participation, spot-on impersonations and innovative sketches.

programme.title: The Tech Download
programme.desc: Hosted by Arjun Kharpal, CNBC's “Tech Download” podcast cuts through the noise to unpack the technology stories that matter most.

programme.title: Squawk Box Europe
programme.desc: It's one hour until the opening bell in Europe and Squawk Box Europe has everything you need to prepare for the first trade. Steve Sedgwick, Karen Tso and Julianna Tatelbaum take on the most complex stories of the day with instant analysis on how you can make your money work around the news.

programme.title: US Squawk Box
programme.desc: “Squawk Box” is the ultimate pre-market morning news and talk program, where the biggest names in business and politics tell their most important stories. Anchored by Joe Kernen, Becky Quick and Andrew Ross Sorkin, the show brings Wall Street to Main Street. It's a must-see for everyone from the professional trader to the casual investor.

programme.title: The Tech Download
programme.desc: Hosted by Arjun Kharpal, CNBC's “Tech Download” podcast cuts through the noise to unpack the technology stories that matter most.

programme.title: CNBC Explains
programme.desc: ‘CNBC Explains' is a dynamic explainer series that dives deep into the forces shaping our world. Each episode unpacks complex business and economic topics, breaking them down into clear, compelling narratives. With expert insights, data-driven visuals and a global perspective, this series helps viewers understand not just what is happening, but why it matters.

programme.title: CNBC Meets
programme.desc: Hosted by Tania Bryer, “CNBC Meets” is an intimate interview series that takes viewers inside the lives and legacies of trailblazers across business, entertainment, sport and politics. Each episode offers rare access to their homes, offices and empires - uncovering the ambitions, challenges and entrepreneurial mindsets that shaped their success and continue to drive them forward.

programme.title: E137
programme.desc: Shivprasad and Shalini, an ordinary married couple, embrace love, laughter, and everyday joys, weaving a simple yet fulfilling life that celebrates togetherness and quiet contentment.

programme.title: E63
programme.desc: Aparajita, a talented artist haunted by her past, crosses paths with Rakshit, a reserved businessman. Though he avoids romance, their unexpected connection might just lead to true love.

programme.title: E830
programme.desc: Sayali desires a fairytale romance, but fate intertwines her with Sachin, a complex figure. Will her dreams of a perfect life survive this unexpected connection?

programme.desc: Time flew by, yet Tulsi Virani stood strong as the Sarvagunn matriarch! Can she navigate the challenges of modern-day parenting and relationships?

programme.title: E1 - Orphle & Winston's Worst Ideas Ever!
programme.desc: Get ready for chaos with Orphle & Winston's worst ideas ever! First, Doubler accidentally multiplies monster truck Orphle, & all the new Orphles team up to cause trouble in Pet Port! Then, Winston wants to be turned into a big cat, but a Magic Pet accidentally turns him into a big rat instead, forcing Mila & Morphle to find him. The bad ideas continue as the two villains try to cheat to win a game of Capture the Flag!

programme.title: E1 - When Buster's Dreams Come to Life!
programme.desc: Join Buster as his amazing dreams come to life! First, he dreams he is a fish, complete with a tail & fins! He's scared when he meets a big shark, but soon learns the shark just wants a friend to play with. Then, it's all stations go as Buster dreams he's a space rocket & blasts off to tour all the planets! The dreams continue as he becomes Sheriff Buster in the wild west & finds a magic spell book that causes all sorts of trouble!

programme.title: E8 - Relaxing Songs
programme.desc: Little Baby Bum is here to help you fall to sleep; with soothing, relaxing animated lullabies. These gentle and sensory videos are accompanied by lullaby versions of much loved nursery rhymes, helping to take you to the land of nod.

programme.title: E1 - Gecko's Genius Outdoor Fixes!
programme.desc: Gecko is using his genius for some amazing outdoor fixes! On a rainy camping trip, Green Mechanical runs out of battery, so Gecko & Grandma create a water wheel from scratch to recharge her with green energy! Then, when Mr. Weasel's advertising blimp starts to fly away with him attached, Gecko must use a bouncy castle to prepare a soft landing! From finding lost keys in a sandcastle to stopping Max from getting stuck in the mud, Gecko can fix it all!

programme.title: E1 - Orphle & Winston's Worst Ideas Ever!
programme.desc: Get ready for chaos with Orphle & Winston's worst ideas ever! First, Doubler accidentally multiplies monster truck Orphle, & all the new Orphles team up to cause trouble in Pet Port! Then, Winston wants to be turned into a big cat, but a Magic Pet accidentally turns him into a big rat instead, forcing Mila & Morphle to find him. The bad ideas continue as the two villains try to cheat to win a game of Capture the Flag!

programme.title: E2 - Construction Chaos & Clever Fixes
programme.desc: Get ready for some construction chaos & clever fixes! First, Mr. Rubble is very tired & puts the plans on the board upside down, causing the crew to build a house upside down! Then, while building a roundabout, the crew finds some big old dinosaur bones! The chaos continues as a power cut stops all their machines, so they hook everything up to clean solar panels instead. From building a pond for frogs to building themselves into a box, it's always chaotic!

programme.title: E1 - The Ultimate Teamwork & Rescue Special!
programme.desc: Get ready for the ultimate teamwork & rescue special with Kii & Yii! The adventure begins when Princess Cat is flying her plane but gets in a sticky jammy mess, causing her to lose control! It's up to Kii & Yii to get her down safely. Then, the friends are playing near Princess Cat's castle when she accidentally falls down the well & needs to be rescued again! From helping Humpty Dumpty to rounding up runaway vegetables, Kii & Yii always save the day!

programme.title: E3 - The Ultimate Outdoor Play Day!
programme.desc: Get ready for the ultimate outdoor play day! Mummy & Daddy take the kids to the park to fly colorful Japanese koinobori kites. Then, Mia & Max head to the pond to feed the ducks, but are shocked to find there are no ducks there! They must go on an adventure to find them. The outdoor fun continues as Mummy sets up a painting session in the park, where the kids have fun discovering new colors with their fingers, hands & feet!

programme.title: E9 - Sleepy Stars
programme.desc: Little Baby Bum is here to help you fall to sleep; with soothing, relaxing animated lullabies. These gentle and sensory videos are accompanied by lullaby versions of much loved nursery rhymes, helping to take you to the land of nod.

programme.title: And I Hate You So
programme.desc: Zhang hosts a top radio program that offers advice regarding love affairs. He starts a love-war relationship with Wu, a columnist, when she hears him gossiping on her love life!

programme.title: Action Master: Tony Ching: A Chinese Odyssey (Part II - Cinderella)
programme.desc: The Joker travels back in time to save his beloved, the reformed devil Boney M. But instead of the right place and right time, he finds himself stranded in five hundred years back...

E1313 - Justice League's Next Top Talent Idol Star: Dance Edition Part 1/Justice League's Nex
programme.desc: It's time for another Justice League talent competition and Vibe is joining the judges' panel to critique the moves of the DC universe dance crews.

programme.title: Lego Dc Comics Super Heroes: Justice League: Attack Of The Legion Of Doom! E1 -Lego Dc Comics Super Heroes: Justice League: Attack Of The Legion Of Doom!
programme.desc: LEGO, DC Comics and Warner Bros. Animation team up for another legendary animated adventure as the superheroes of the Justice League face off against their greatest foes.

programme.title: E76 - Summer Love/Citizen Tabes
programme.desc: Panda goes on a mission to return a lost phone to the girl of his dreams.

programme.title: E182 - The Inquisition/The Sucker/The Cage/The Rival/The One
programme.desc: The students of Elmore Junior High find their world turned upside down when the mysterious school superintendent comes to stamp out their cartoonish ways. But who wants to be normal? Certainly not Gumball and Darwin...

programme.title: E1 - The Power/Dizzy/The Best Burger In The World/Cool Cubed/Expert Or Liar
programme.desc: Rigby steals a magic keyboard from a preoccupied sorcerer. When Mordecai and Rigby accidentally make a hole in the wall while wrestling a stuffed animal, they use the keyboard to make Pops and Benson give them raises to try to pay for it.

programme.title: E49 - A. The Mirror/The Burden/The Bros/The Man/The Pizza
programme.desc: When Gumball refuses to forward a scare email, the curse becomes all too real.

programme.title: E1286 - The Night Begins To Shine 2: Chapter Four – Bass/The Night Begins To Shine 2: Chapter
programme.desc: To retrieve the final stem, the Titans must conjure a virtual world full of increasingly harder obstacles in the fourth part of the five-part special.

programme.title: E3
programme.desc: In this TV series, Adam inspires Italian chefs to explore uncharted territories, urging them to craft innovative spaghetti dishes using exotic ingredients.

programme.title: E3 - Sibu
programme.desc: Chef Alex Ting joins Audra for a tour around his home town. Sibu is largely populated by Chinese of Foochow descent from Fuzhou.

programme.title: E4 - Mukah & Betong
programme.desc: We travel to the coastal fishing town of Mukah, about two-hours drive from Sibu, and famous for all things seafood.

programme.title: E7 - Shaoyang Auditions For The Bull King Competition
programme.desc: Shaoyang auditions for the Bull King Competition with Hui Halal Beef Buns, Suge's Hui Halal Skewers, Stir-Fried Beef with Chicken Comb Oil.

programme.desc: Eat with David is a food and travel show, culinary travel series, where we take viewers on a global food adventures and travel destinations.

programme.title: E330
programme.desc: Two-day road trip to the beautiful spots in all the corners of Korea! Instead of fancy studio, this on-the-road reality show takes place in the rural sides. While over 10 million Koreans travel abroad each year, the '2 Days and 1 Night' casts travel around Korea - to the mountains, farms, fishing villages, islands - where you can meet the welcoming smiles of our neighbors and the beautiful nature that cleanse our eyes.

programme.title: E330
programme.desc: Two-day road trip to the beautiful spots in all the corners of Korea! Instead of fancy studio, this on-the-road reality show takes place in the rural sides. While over 10 million Koreans travel abroad each year, the '2 Days and 1 Night' casts travel around Korea - to the mountains, farms, fishing villages, islands - where you can meet the welcoming smiles of our neighbors and the beautiful nature that cleanse our eyes.

programme.title: Recipe For Love
programme.desc: In Onjeong Market, located in Onjeong, a town some distance away from Seoul, the area is buzzing with change as apartment complexes are built and plans for subway extensions and new town developments are announced. Across a single street stand a principled general hospital, Gongmyeongjeongdae Clinic, and traditional Korean clinic, Yangji Barun Clinic. The two families who run these places have been bitter enemies for years, bound by a long standing grudge from an incident in the past. Even the smallest matters turn into big fights, making them the most famous rival families in Onjeong. This is a family growth drama about these two families as they unravel their long held misunderstandings, heal their wounds, learn to love one another, and are reborn as one family.

programme.title: Noona, You Are A Woman To Me
programme.desc: Age is just a number-attraction is pure instinct. Charismatic “Noonas” (older women) who have long put love on hold to pursue their careers meet younger men who fearlessly follow their hearts, sparking emotionally driven romances. Breaking through the real-world barriers of age differences, this bold and candid reality series follows older-woman–younger-man couples as they explore love with honesty and courage. As their relationships unfold, long-dormant romantic instincts are awakened in this refreshingly daring dating reality show.

programme.desc: 年輕狀元郎陸江來上任淳寧縣令後屢破奇案，卻因捲入一樁殺妻舊案，從官場新星淪落至絕境。瀕死之際，幸得茶王之女榮善寶搭救。兩人聯手整頓家族、開拓茶道，在茶園裡締結了一段愛情佳話。

programme.title: E7
programme.desc: 盛唐初年，氣象萬千；夜魅長安，業孽浮屠。光怪陸離之下盡是怪異之事，血雨腥風間暗藏獵殺危局。盛世奇譚，詭案揭幕。

programme.title: E17
programme.desc: 故事講述了周筱風（趙又廷 飾）、方筱然（毛曉彤 飾）和林逸（金世佳 飾）三位心臟科醫生機緣巧合下，在東立醫院心臟中心相遇。三人因專業背景、職業理念不同而產生摩擦碰撞，隨後在治病救人的過程中逐漸磨合達成默契，最終在生命戰場並肩作戰的故事。

programme.title: E16
programme.desc: 年輕狀元郎陸江來上任淳寧縣令後屢破奇案，卻因捲入一樁殺妻舊案，從官場新星淪落至絕境。瀕死之際，幸得茶王之女榮善寶搭救。兩人聯手整頓家族、開拓茶道，在茶園裡締結了一段愛情佳話。

programme.title: E13
programme.desc: 朱韻剛開始大學生活，就被“壞小子”李峋的闖入徹底顛覆了世界。被朱韻當成不學無術富家子的他，真實身份竟是學校破格錄取的特招生，難得一見的編程天才。兩人在幾次交鋒後，對彼此都有些賞識。學長方志靖對朱韻多次刁難，李峋出手維護朱韻，還邀她加入了自己組建的備賽隊伍，代表學校贏得了重大編程比賽。在相處中，兩人情感日益升溫

programme.title: E13
programme.desc: 朱韻剛開始大學生活，就被“壞小子”李峋的闖入徹底顛覆了世界。被朱韻當成不學無術富家子的他，真實身份竟是學校破格錄取的特招生，難得一見的編程天才。兩人在幾次交鋒後，對彼此都有些賞識。學長方志靖對朱韻多次刁難，李峋出手維護朱韻，還邀她加入了自己組建的備賽隊伍，代表學校贏得了重大編程比賽。在相處中，兩人情感日益升溫

programme.title: E56
programme.desc: 程家女名少商，因戰亂自幼被父母留在祖母身邊成為“留守兒童”，嬸孃狼心縱容，意圖將其養成廢人。面對重重陷阱，程少商（趙露思飾）為活命，假荒誕、真苦學，掩蓋鋒芒等待父母歸來。可撥開烏雲見月明時，卻因多年疏離致使親情已難再拾。缺愛的程少商，遇新帝義子凌不疑（吳磊飾）、白鹿山才子袁慎、世家子弟樓垚，三人各有優劣。在選擇適婚者上，程少商既自卑又務實，儘管情感之路頗多坎坷，但她從不後悔自己的每次選擇。在與凌不疑的相處之中，也陰差陽錯捲入了凌不疑的家庭與身世之謎中。種種事件，程少商屢立奇功，也從凌不疑的家庭關係中學會與父母相處之道，以及如何經營自己的愛情。同時程少商與凌不疑也在這些經歷中各自變化成長，慢慢與自己和家庭和解，並堅守內心的正義，攜手化解國家危機，成就一段佳話。

programme.title: E29
programme.desc: 《超時空羅曼史》講述了民國功夫巨星向秦羽，因一場意外來到21世紀，與十八線編劇金阿銀相遇，兩人展開了奇妙浪漫又充滿戲劇性的愛情故事。

programme.title: E9 - Hard Truths of Conservation
programme.desc: When Dick Cabela founded “Cabela’s” in 1961, he was unaware it would become the foremost outfitting store in the world. So it’s only fitting that his son is on a quest to explore the Hard Truths of conservation. Join Dan Cabela, on this high-impact journey of discovery, as he uncovers some lesser-known facts about conservation. In particular, the role which hunting and the utilization of wildlife can play as a modern-day conservation tool.

programme.title: E7 - Chase the Sun
programme.desc: Red Bull are known for their crazy events and have asked the team to do their latest version, Chase the Sun. A gruelling 24 hour team challenge to try and cover 350 km.

programme.desc: Adventurer Bear Grylls teaches the unified world heavyweight champion some alternative survival skills.

programme.title: E9 - Whitetail Deer & Cranberries
programme.desc: Daniel and Avani harvest cranberries on a floating peat moss island, and they find some long range hunting in the dense Northeastern deer woods.

programme.title: E10 - Landlocked Salmon & Chaga
programme.desc: Daniel joins lifelong friends on a frozen lake to fish below the hard water for landlocked Atlantic salmon, and also searches high in the trees for a chaga mushroom.

Now redesigned as a primetime “concert experience,” ASAP XP brings together top OPM icons, rising stars, and fan-favorite performers in a high-energy weekly showcase.

programme.title: 2 Good 2 Be True[Live]
programme.desc: Ali, a hardworking nurse with big dreams, crosses paths with Eloy, a clever mechanic secretly living a double life as a con artist and law student. Their rocky first meeting leads to an unexpected partnership involving a wealthy old man, hidden identities, family secrets, and emotional healing. As love grows amid deception, the series explores trust, redemption, and second chances, blending romance, comedy, and drama.

programme.title: Sigabo[Live]
programme.desc: The series explores the stark contrast in the lives of two individuals: Gabo (Martin), a spunky, street-smart man from a vibrant, humble community, and Samantha (Montes), a tough, fearless law enforcer from a highly affluent and privileged background. It blends action, romance, and comedy as their paths cross and their different worlds collide.

programme.title: E2 - Bearing It All
programme.desc: After an evasive conversation at the Summer Solstice party, Boz and Rachel are left wondering about the sincerity of certain friendships. Erika turns to Sutton for support amid a looming lawsuit. Kyle opens up about the ending of her first relationship since separating from her husband. Dorit fights back tears as her divorce takes a toll on her family. New housewife Amanda meets the group at Jennifer Tilly's racy Sip & Draw party.

programme.title: E5 - Not Feeling The Healing
programme.desc: In Sedona, Kyle and Dorit's rift persists. While Boz and Rachel struggle with the heat, others hike to a vortex. Amanda shares rumors about Sutton's ex-assistant, and Jennifer Tilly clashes with Sutton.

programme.title: E11 - The Price Of Divorce
programme.desc: Sutton and Jennifer Tilly weigh in on a new, but all-too-familiar woman from Sutton's past.

programme.title: E14 - Unmasking The Truth
programme.desc: The ladies of Beverly Hills hit the streets of Florence for some Italian high-end retail therapy.

programme.title: E3 - And The Court Had A Clerk...
programme.desc: Liz represents a bicycle shop in a libel case. Marissa receives an interesting offer. A questionable client comes to the firm, asking for Carmen to represent him.

programme.title: E4 - Found Family
programme.desc: Charles races to convince a patient to accept treatment before it's too late. Frost bonds with a young girl battling immunodeficiency.

programme.desc: A personal clash between Asher and Archer reaches a breaking point.

programme.title: Biz Talk
programme.desc: A groundbreaking 30-minute interview show, giving an in-depth look into how top companies around the world conduct business and how policymakers view the fast-changing world economy. programme.title: E8 - 音樂靈感隨潮汐湧動
programme.desc: 7位風格迥異的音樂人張震嶽、張碧晨、武藝、小鬼-王琳凱、歐陽娜娜、王赫野、陳卓璇將組成「音你小隊」，受邀參與一場馬來西亞音樂節，結伴踏上異國他鄉的文化探索之旅，沉浸式感受當地的風土人情，探尋當地音樂，進行面對面的音樂交流與互動，用音樂搭建起跨越國界的文化橋梁，展現出音樂無國界的魅力。

programme.title: E11 - 大張偉Amber音樂盛典放大招
programme.desc: 在音樂主題上再度突破，以「一路為伍，向生綻放」為主題，甄選了貼近生活的歌曲和作品，用歌聲傳遞正能量；邀請了A-Lin、大張偉、庾澄慶、馬嘉祺、光良、蘇慧玲、任賢齊、陳卓璇、曾比特、白舉綱、吳莫愁等老、中、青三代歌手，在全新升級的「盲選配對」模式中組合獻唱，在代際傳承、時代交融中突破自我，打造一場最溫暖、最動人的音樂盛宴。

programme.title: E2
programme.desc: 亞洲天后孫燕姿首次亮相內地跨年，香港“古惑仔”五兄弟陳小春、鄭伊健、謝天華、林曉峰、錢嘉樂全員重聚，韓國歌王Theone鄭淳元和韓劇新一代“男神”池昌旭重磅加盟，還有亞洲女子天團SHE合體獻唱，內地實力唱將沙寶亮和R&B小王子胡彥斌等海內外明星共同迎接新年到來。

programme.title: E2
programme.desc: 亞洲天后孫燕姿首次亮相內地跨年，香港“古惑仔”五兄弟陳小春、鄭伊健、謝天華、林曉峰、錢嘉樂全員重聚，韓國歌王Theone鄭淳元和韓劇新一代“男神”池昌旭重磅加盟，還有亞洲女子天團SHE合體獻唱，內地實力唱將沙寶亮和R&B小王子胡彥斌等海內外明星共同迎接新年到來。
